visits.note: Patient presents with new onset of fatigue and polyuria. Physical examination reveals normal blood pressure and weight. Blood work is significant for HbA1c 7.2%, LDL 130, and eGFR 80. Diagnoses include Type 2 Diabetes, Hyperlipidemia, and Chronic Kidney Disease. Plan includes initiation of metformin 500mg twice daily and atorvastatin 20mg daily.

Follow-up visit for patient with Type 2 Diabetes. Patient reports improved energy levels but continues to experience polyuria. Blood work is significant for HbA1c 6.8%, LDL 120, and eGFR 72. Physical examination reveals increased blood pressure at 150/90. Plan includes adjustment of metformin to 500mg TID and lisinopril 5mg daily.

Patient returns for 6-month follow-up. Patient reports worsening fatigue and increased frequency of urination. Blood work is significant for HbA1c 7.5%, LDL 140, and eGFR 68. Physical examination reveals increased blood pressure at 160/95 and new onset of edema. Plan includes adjustment of metformin to 1000mg BID, atorvastatin to 40mg daily, and addition of furosemide 20mg daily.

Patient returns for follow-up after 8 months. Patient reports stable energy levels but continues to experience polyuria and edema. Blood work is significant for HbA1c 7.0%, LDL 110, and eGFR 60. Physical examination reveals stable blood pressure at 140/80. Plan includes adjustment of metformin to 1000mg BID and addition of aspirin 81mg daily.
